data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement of 'Hybrid participation parity (remote can ask questions, vote)', but there is no evidence provided that confirms this functionality. While the linked use case mentions that 'Hand-raising works both ways' and 'Polls include all participants', there is no concrete evidence from API reads or persisted state checks that explicitly demonstrates remote participants can ask questions or vote. Therefore, this step reveals a gap in the requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence confirming that remote participants can ask questions or vote.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
